docs.text: Github Bug Report Text Template ¶ Use this template to report bugs in a consistent format. Copy template Download raw text Tip Click Copy template to place the plain-text issue body on your clipboard. Environment ¶ Platform: OS Version: Platform Version: Testing Software Version: Device Models: Accounts: ID: Connection Type: Description ¶ Steps to reproduce ¶ Expected result ¶ Actual result ¶ Reproducibility Rate ¶ Always Generally Frequently Often Sometimes Occasionally Rarely Workarounds ¶ Severity (Reference) ¶ Critical High Moderate Low Priority (Reference) ¶ High Medium Low Screenshots / Videos / Logs ¶ Notes ¶ Raw source ¶ The exact copy target is stored as assets/template.txt .
